title: Nautilus Diver
description: A Vanilla Friendly Solution to the Longest Aquatic Problem!
body:
**A Simple Mod that adds a new Helmet to the game that is Vanilla Friendly!**

**The Nautilus Helmet can be crafted using 2 Nautilus Shells, 2 Copper and a Heart of the Sea.**\
![Nautilus Helmet Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b1ae00c9080a78f625702c74b4f42b06cbb4e5c.png)\
**It provides the wearer with infinite water breathing effect (unlike the turtle shell).**
